cost_model.fees: synthetic fixed fee assumption only, not execution evidence
cost_model.spread: synthetic nonzero spread assumption for protocol metadata

path_rules.entry_time: synthetic bar close at fixture timestamp
path_rules.exit_time: five synthetic sessions after entry timestamp
path_rules.path_dependency: metadata only path rule; no labels are materialized

target_stop_rules.stop: metadata-only stop rule; no target or stop values are computed
target_stop_rules.target: metadata-only target definition for future label construction

notes: Synthetic label-integrity fixture requests a feature that overlaps the forbidden label reference; it is recorded under the catalogued permuted_labels canary and contains no materialized labels.
